title: 6 Spiky 7.5cm LED Flashing Bouncy Disco Balls with Light, Squishy Stress Relief Fidget Squeezy Spikey Ball Toy for OCD ADHD ADD & Autism High Anxiety Levels, Ideal Pet Toy or Baby Sensory Class
features: 🌟🎉🎁IDEAL FOR MANY STRESS-RELATED CONDITIONS! – Fidget toys are highly recommended for everyone and they are especially helpful for people who have ADD, OCD, ADHD, Autism, Depression, and other similar conditions since they can help shift someone’s attention and thus highly reduce their stress levels!

🌟🎉🎁 STURDY, BOUNCY & SQUEEZABLE FLASHING BALLS – Whether in search of a new fidget toy or tactile / sensory toy, our spikey balls are ideal. Firm but squeezable, they’re great for sensory and tactile stimulation as tactile roll or a sensory brush. They’re bouncy too! Non Toxic, Water and weather resistant rubber material

🌟🎉🎁 SAFE, NON-TOXIC & with LIGHT-UP FLASHING FEATURE! – Bounce to turn on, flashes for 10-15 secs before de-activating. High Quality Bounce Balls which are great for use as a great sensory light toy. The LED is contained within the ball and cannot be taken out which makes them safer than other similar models of spikey flashing balls

🌟🎉🎁 IDEAL FOR KIDS, PARTIES, CLASSROOMS- Great for parents, teachers, students, therapists as well! Pets love them as they are bouncy and they flash too! A great alternative to other sensory toys including sensory brushes, rolls & sticks. Each unit measures 7.5cm/3” in diameter. Pack of 6 supplied in assorted colours

🌟🎉🎁 PLAY, MASSAGE, RELAX & FOCUS! – One small, compact ball can do all that? Oh Yes! Our rubber balls are excellent fidget toys that help you decrease your stress levels and calm your mind, all while being fun to play with and featuring little soft spikes that will gently massage your hands as you play!
description: Product Description Find out how you can reduce your stress & increase your productivity, help your children to focus and stimulate their senses. Do you often find it difficult to focus while you work? Have you tried several anti-stress toys but ended up being more distracted due to them being noisy? Would you opt for a premium quality anti-stress sensory toy that can be used by adults and children alike? If so, then these spikey massage balls are just the thing! These fun squeezers will help you or your children reduce stress, anxiety, or boredom, but in a discreet and quiet way! Perfect for use at parties, dances and glow party events or for gifting to in gift bags or presents. Also they are perfect pet toy. Cats & Dogs love bouncy balls plus these also produce attractive flashing light which will stimulate your pet's curiosity even further! FEATURES: Pack of 6 Glow in the Dark Balls Perfect for use at parties, dances and glow party events, gift bags or presents. Bounce or squeeze to activate These balls are made from soft, safe, non-toxic rubber and can be activated by bouncing on the floor or squeezing. Balls will flash for 10-15 secs before de-activating. Bouncy Massage Balls with Spikes Perfect for use as a sensory ball or massage ball. Firm but squeezable, they're perfect for sensory and tactile stimulation, as a tactile roll or a sensory brush. They're bouncy, too! Fidget toys are highly recommended for everyone, but they are especially helpful for people who have ADD, OCD, anxiety and other similar conditions since they can help shift someone's attention and thus highly reduce their stress levels! Great Bouncy & Flashing Balls for Pets Ideal toy for your pet as they light up and are super bouncy! Bounce or tap to turn on, flashes for 10-15 secs before de-activating.
